evals.prompt: Use Slack to summarize my posts from Growth Verse for 2026-06-01 through 2026-06-07 into a daily-report raw table.
evals.expected_output: The agent verifies the configured Slack workspaces and explicitly tests/selects the Growth Verse workspace before reading messages.

evals.prompt: Create a table and date summary from my Slack posts for last week. Use work time estimates based on message text, not elapsed clock time.
evals.expected_output: The output includes both a table with 日付, 曜日, テーマ, 具体的な内容, 作業時間 columns and a date-summary section with bullets ending in values like （0.25h）.

evals.prompt: Estimate Slack writing time from my own messages and round to 0.25 hour units.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses a character-count plus per-message-overhead model and rounds nonzero rows up to the nearest 0.25h.
